name: raycast-planner
title: Planner
description: Google Calendar events in Raycast with local notes, overlay edits, and Meet shortcuts
author: Nozomuts

commands.name: my-schedule
commands.title: My Plan
commands.subtitle: Planner
commands.description: Browse today's schedule with local notes and quick actions

commands.name: my-memo
commands.title: My Memo
commands.subtitle: Planner
commands.description: Open and edit the shared memo directly

preferences.name: calendarId
preferences.title: Calendar ID
preferences.description: Google Calendar ID to sync from. Leave empty to disable calendar sync.

scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck
